translated: [CORNER: Card Illustrations] Next up is the trained version.
Isn't this incredible?
I think it's absolutely stunning.
I was thinking, "Only you could pull off short pants like that."
She's truly beautiful.
Thank you.
I just want to say thank you for this.
It's a rare aesthetic for Niigo overall, which is really nice.
She's probably holding a book about daisies here, right?
My knowledge of daisies is a bit too shallow to say for sure,
but I'm sure that's what it is.
Man, this is great.
The idea of "sharing something delicious" is so lovely.
Everything tastes better when you share it.
And then, look at this!
Kanade-chan!
She's way too cute.
This outfit looks exactly like something Mizuki or Yuki-san would pick out.
She looks a little troubled, too.
But of course it looks good on her!
Setting aside where she'd actually wear it,
I'm not sure if Kanade would really wear that headpiece
when she occasionally goes out.
But it suits her.
If it looks good, I think she should wear it!
Seriously, she's so adorable.
Thank you all for always being so cute.
And here's the trained version.
She looks like a proper young lady here.
I assume these are daisies too,
right?
The ones on her chest and head surely are.
In the Side Story, Kanade-chan is so cute
getting forced to try on all these different clothes.
I definitely recommend checking out the Side Story as well.
Everyone in the chat is saying how cute she is.
She really is.
It's so good.
Doing these AfterTalks makes me realize how rare it is to see Niigo in white.
And Mafuyu-san.
Wow, this is great.
She's almost smiling.
Seeing Mafuyu with even a hint of a smile makes me so happy. This event story was so heartwarming,
and I think it's wonderful how that warmth carries through into all of these illustrations.
